summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed open PRs plus one hydrated security-sensitive linked issue. No GitHub mutations, merges, labels, or fix PRs are planned. Most PRs are retained for ordinary maintainer review; #91414 is a planned superseded closeout because its linked issue was already fixed on main, #91397 needs maintainer judgment, and #64891 is routed to central security handling only.
